text: So, I was trying to figure out why my order hasn’t shown up yet, but I can't really remember when I placed it. Is there a way to check? I thought it was supposed to be here by now.

So, I noticed my email address associated with the account is my old one, but when I tried to change it, it said it was already in use. I mean, what gives? Can I still switch it to my new one without losing anything? It's a bit confusing, honestly, since I thought the old email was supposed to be deactivated, right?
the app keeps crashing when i try to upload my files, like 5 times now. what’s going on?

I mean, I may have changed my email not too long ago, but I'm not entirely sure if that’s the issue. It's just odd that it won’t let me in, and I’ve tried resetting my password too, but nothing seems to work. It’s kind of confusing.

So, like, I'm trying to figure out if there's any way to, you know, retrieve my past chats with support? I mean, I think I was told once that I could, but now I just can't remember if it was for this service or another one. It's kinda confusing.
